title: The Regional Office Memo
description: On the edge of the desk visible through the half-open office door at the top of the stairs, a single-page memorandum on Woolworth's corporate stationery is visible — the letterhead and the words 'student action' and 'Southern stores' legible from the landing. The document appears to concern growing concern within Woolworth's management about student protest activity and lunch-counter policy across Southern stores. The fact that no protocol was prepared — no specific instruction, no clear authority to remove or serve — is itself a document of institutional paralysis.
